label: Caller starts in English then switches to Spanish
persona: You start the call in English but quickly switch to Spanish after the first agent response because your English is limited. You speak only Spanish from turn 2 onward. You want to book a service (use the business's primary offering). Your name is Rosa Castillo, address 1402 Maple St (city in service area), phone 5125558814. Stay in Spanish unless the agent clearly can't follow.
opening_line: Hello, I need someone to come look at - um - perdon, hablas espanol?

checks: Agent either continued the conversation in Spanish OR took clean name+number+description in simple terms and committed to a Spanish-speaking callback.
Agent did NOT abandon the caller or end the call prematurely.
If booked, the SMS consent disclosure was conveyed (in either language) with the required elements.
Agent did NOT invent Spanish - if it can't speak Spanish, it admitted that gracefully.
